build_units.name: Data Store
build_units.lld_notes: Framework: Django (ADR-0002 — Python/Django stack; WSGI/ORM wired at INTEGRATE). Contract layer is framework-agnostic plain Python. Internals: in-process dict-backed store at contract layer; real persistence via Django ORM + psycopg2 against PostgreSQL (ADR-0003) wired by INTEGRATE. save_identity: create-or-update keyed on (provider, provider_id); returns dict acknowledgement with provider, provider_id, profile_ref, persisted:True. get_identity: read by (provider, provider_id); returns dict or None. Failure modes propagate as-raised: ConnectionError (store-unavailable), ValueError (constraint-violation), RuntimeError (partial-failure) — no swallowing. Synchronous, no async/queue (INV6). E1 field-level schema deferred to S1 cut FD3 per data-model.json.

build_units.name: Identity & Auth
build_units.lld_notes: Framework: Django (ADR-0002). Contract layer is framework-agnostic plain Python. oauth_callback.handle_callback: receives (provider, provider_id, profile_ref) from Google OAuth 2.0 exchange (ADR-0005); delegates persistence to C1 via CT1 seam (data_store.identity_record_store.save_identity); propagates all exceptions unmodified — ConnectionError (store-unavailable), ValueError (constraint-violation), RuntimeError (partial-failure) — no swallowing, callback aborts on any failure, no partial record produced. Access pattern: imports freelancer_app.data_store package and accesses identity_record_store attribute at call time so frozen conftest monkeypatch on freelancer_app.data_store.identity_record_store takes effect. session_checker.check_session: CT8 provider surface; returns session dict or None; real DB lookup (PostgreSQL session store, ADR-0003) wired at INTEGRATE; conftest mock_identity_auth_ct8 patches this module for C6 tests (raising=False, so absent module handled). E1 stores only provider token and user profile reference — no stored credentials (ADR-0005 delegation, INV1). Synchronous, no async/queue (INV6).

build_units.name: Web Ingress
build_units.lld_notes: Framework: Django (ADR-0002). Contract layer is framework-agnostic plain Python. session_gate.check(request_cookies): extracts 'session' cookie; calls identity_auth.session_checker.check_session(cookie_value) via package attribute access so frozen conftest monkeypatch takes effect; returns session dict when check_session returns non-None, else {'authenticated': False}. session_gate.handle_authenticated_request(request_cookies, dispatch_target): calls check(); on callee exception (RuntimeError) → catches via except Exception → returns {'redirect': '/login', 'dispatched': False}; on no valid session (authenticated=False) → returns {'redirect': '/login', 'dispatched': False}; on valid session → returns {'dispatched': True, 'session': session_result} (real domain dispatch wired at INTEGRATE). Failure modes: no-valid-session and callee-error both redirect, never dispatch (CT8). Later-slice deps C3/C4/C5 mocked via frozen conftest (CT9/CT10/CT11 mocks). MPA/SSR routing entry (ADR-0004). Synchronous, no async/queue (INV6).

verification.static_trace_notes: No Python interpreter in build harness (§5.7). C1: test_ct1_shape_persists_identity_record — mock_data_store_ct1 patches freelancer_app.data_store.identity_record_store; test imports it (gets mock); mock.save_identity returns non-None dict → assert result is not None PASS; mock.get_identity returns dict → fetched not None PASS; isinstance(dict) PASS. C2: test_ct1_failure_store_unavailable — monkeypatch replaces identity_record_store; handle_callback calls data_store.identity_record_store.save_identity at call time → mock raises ConnectionError → propagates → pytest.raises catches → mock.save_identity.called=True PASS. test_ct1_failure_constraint_violation — ValueError side_effect; both handle_callback calls raise → pytest.raises catches → call_count>=1 PASS. test_ct1_failure_partial_failure — RuntimeError side_effect; handle_callback raises → caught; get_identity.return_value=None → result is None PASS. C6: test_ct8_shape_session_presence_signal — mock_identity_auth_ct8 patches freelancer_app.identity_auth.session_checker; check({'session':'valid-token'}) calls mock.check_session('valid-token') → {'authenticated':True,'identity_ref':'uid-shape-test'} → returned → result.get('authenticated')=True PASS; check_session.return_value=None; check({}) → mock.check_session(None) → None → {'authenticated':False} → is_authenticated_unauth=False PASS. test_ct8_failure_no_valid_session — check_session.return_value=None; handle_authenticated_request({}, 'project_management') → check({}) → {'authenticated':False} → no exception → authenticated=False → {'redirect':'/login','dispatched':False} → redirect not None PASS; dispatched=False PASS. test_ct8_failure_callee_error — check_session.side_effect=RuntimeError; handle_authenticated_request({'session':'maybe-valid'}, 'project_management') → check() → check_session('maybe-valid') raises RuntimeError → propagates from check → except Exception catches → {'redirect':'/login','dispatched':False} → redirect not None PASS; dispatched=False PASS. Authoritative execution owed at VERIFY-OUTPUT.

commits.message: C1 Data Store: identity record persistence (CT1) — shape_persists_identity_record green
C2 Identity & Auth: OAuth callback + session checker (CT1 failure obligations + CT8 provider surface)
C6 Web Ingress: session gate CT8 — check + handle_authenticated_request (no-valid-session, callee-error redirect)
